title: 弥生賞の後に・生まれた戸惑い

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
What an incredible performance from Silence
Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Arrgh! I was this close to passing her!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry. I'm having a little trouble concentrating.
choice_data_list: I'm here if you need to talk.
I'm here if you need to talk.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate the concern. I'll be okay on my own,
though.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
If I run in it now, I feel like I might not be able to
give it my all.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
So... Can I take some time to consider whether I
want to enter or not?
choice_data_list: Take all the time you need.
Take all the time you need.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: However, it's no good not to have a goal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As far as Classic races go, she may still be able to
run in the Kikuka Sho in the autumn if we set our
sights on September's Kobe Shimbun Hai in
preparation.
choice_data_list: How about running in the Kobe Shimbun Hai?
How about running in the Kobe Shimbun Hai?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I don't know if I'll be able to perform so well...
choice_data_list: It's better than not racing at all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spend the next few days wondering what I can
do for her.
